author: y4rr
content: Decision: For #855 (DeviceMesh), the test reads f.mesh_shape/f.mesh_world_size but fixture only has 'shape'/'world_size'. Since the Fixture struct already has both 'shape' and 'world_size' fields (used by other fixtures), the correct fix is to change the test to read f.shape and f.world_size instead of f.mesh_shape/f.mesh_world_size. This is purely test-side — no fixture modification or struct field addition needed.
